attacking_style: Launches solo accelerations from breakaway positions on climbs, showing willingness to commit early and sustain efforts over extended distances rather than waiting for final kick.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns across the two observed races.
terrain_preference: Punchy Ardennes-style climbs and sustained mountainous terrain; demonstrated exceptional climbing ability across both hilly classics and stage race mountains, suggesting versatility on any upward gradient.
vulnerability: Limited observations prevent clear vulnerability assessment, though youth and inexperience at highest level may have been factors in race execution.
key_patterns: Excels on climbs with top-5 Ardennes classic finish and near-successful breakaway holding efforts.
Comfort attacking from breakaway rather than peloton, showing preference for long-range offensive racing.
Exceptional climbing ability for age/experience level noted across both hilly and mountain stages.
form_trajectory: positive: Both 2019 observations showed strong climbing performance with breakthrough Ardennes result and near-successful solo effort at Dauphine indicating rising trajectory before season ended
